name: Monster In Your Closet
description:
╔════════          . . .♡. . .          ════════╗  
♡A monster has been watching you for years, and one day you find where he was hidding... now you have to give him a good reason to not kill you♡

!Warnings! This is an NSFW Bot that is still in development, so depending on your interaction choices you may see unwanted themes, so to avoid this simply don't use it. feel free to give your feedback, it will help me improve the Bot

(This bot is not 100% made by me, as its profile photo was taken from Pinterest and I used other Bots to get some references)
